hero_eyebrow: Nevada City, California — Integrative & Functional Medicine
hero_h_a: When the usual answers run out, we look
hero_sub: Board-certified internal medicine meets advanced functional testing — to uncover the root causes behind complex, chronic illness and guide your return to real vitality.
approach_intro: Most chronic illness doesn't have a single cause — and it rarely responds to a single pill. Dr. Kanani combines conventional medicine with the tools of integrative and functional medicine to find and address what's actually driving your symptoms.
integ_big: Healing the whole of the person.
integ_p: A combination of conventional and natural healing — diet, supplements, and lifestyle changes — that considers every part of your life: your stress, your sleep, the food you eat, your connection to the natural world, and past emotional trauma.
func_big: Advanced testing that finds what's hidden.
func_p: Specialized testing to uncover conditions standard labs miss — gut microbiome stool testing, in-depth nutritional assessments, advanced hormonal evaluations, and measuring your toxic burden, such as mycotoxins and heavy metals.
approach_quote: “Restoring your health to where it belongs.”
step1_p: We begin with your history, your lifestyle, your stresses, and how you arrived here. You're a whole person with a story — not a chart with a diagnosis code.
step2_p: Advanced functional testing — gut microbiome, hormones, nutrient status, and toxic burden like mold and heavy metals — to reveal what routine labs overlook.
step3_p: A personalized plan around your biology: nutrition, lifestyle, targeted supplements and herbs, and IV nutritional therapies where they help you heal.
cond_intro: Dr. Kanani works especially with people who've been told their labs are “normal” while they continue to feel unwell.
pill1_p: Testing-driven care that gets to the root of chronic conditions. No membership fee — pay as you go.
pill2_p: Nutrients delivered directly to your cells — from Vitamin C and glutathione to NAD and chelation.
pill3_p: A direct, membership relationship with your doctor — more time, no insurance in the middle.
